features.name: arithmetic right shift with $signed cast on operand
features.description: Code should include an arithmetic right shift (>>>) where the shifted operand is wrapped with $signed() to force signed interpretation, producing a signed shift result

features.name: nested $signed() wrapping arithmetic right shift result
features.description: Code should include a nested $signed() cast where the inner expression is itself a $signed()-cast operand shifted right arithmetically, i.e. $signed($signed(x) >>> y)

features.name: addition of signed value with nested-signed arithmetic right shift
features.description: Code should include an addition where one operand is a signed value and the other is the result of $signed($signed(x) >>> y), testing operator precedence between + and >>> when $signed wrapping is involved

features.name: bit-slice of signed addition result cast back to signed
features.description: Code should include a bit-slice of a signed addition expression result, followed by a $signed() cast to convert the unsigned slice back to a signed type
